name: Siddharth Rastogi

summary: Architected and delivered scalable Next.js applications with user-centric UI/UX.
Implemented code splitting, lazy loading, and Akamai CDN caching.
Designed responsive UI architecture using Material UI and Tailwind CSS.
Owned Overseas platform architecture with i18n support and CleverTap integration.
Implemented frontend API caching strategies for performance and SEO improvements.
Led frontend development team and code review processes.
Adopted AI-assisted engineering workflows.
Integrated UPI payment gateway across multiple platforms, processing 120,000+ transactions/month on the web application with high reliability and cross-platform consistency.
Improved overall Node.js application performance by 20% through profiling, query optimization, and architectural refactoring.
Enhanced core website functionality by optimizing key Web Vitals metrics — INP, TBT, CLS, and LCP — resulting in improved Google Search ranking signals and user experience scores
Redesigned site architecture to improve navigation, accessibility (WCAG standards), and cross-device compatibility, reducing bounce rates on mobile.
Developed scalable applications using React.js, Redux, and TypeScript.
Used AI-assisted development workflows to accelerate sprint delivery.
Built, designed, and maintained high-quality web pages using JavaScript and React.js, implementing optimized rendering techniques to improve page responsiveness.
Refactored legacy JavaScript, React.js, and Laravel codebases.
Improved RESTful API integrations.
Won the HiverBee Hackathon.
Contributed to DevOps processes leveraging AWS and Docker, gaining hands-on expertise in container-based deployments and cloud infrastructure.
Delivered customized technical solutions across client projects, developing dynamic, high-quality web pages using React.js, JavaScript, and RESTful APIs
Built reusable, accessible UI components using jQuery, HTML, and SCSS within Drupal Site Studio, reducing component development time across teams
Actively participated in CI/CD pipeline management and deployments using Git and Acquia Cloud, contributing to smoother and faster release cycles.
Earned three Inspiring Performance Badges for exceptional performance and dedication.

about: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 6.5+ years of experience architecting and delivering scalable, high-performance web applications. Proven expertise in React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js, with a track record of measurable performance gains — including a 20% improvement in system performance at Spinny. Experienced in leading frontend teams, owning full-platform architecture (including internationalization), and integrating AI-assisted workflows to accelerate delivery without compromising quality.
personal_tech_stack: JavaScript, TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Redux, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, MongoDB, MySQL, AWS, Docker, Git, CI/CD, CleverTap, RESTful APIs, i18n.
